title: Family Plan
excerpt: Monday is a great tool, but the pricing is prohibitive for me to use it for my personal life.  My family really could use something like this for organising all the work we have to do in our house, building work, garden …

posts.author: RichL (Rich Linnell)
posts.cookedHtml:
Monday is a great tool, but the pricing is prohibitive for me to use it for my personal life. My family really could use something like this for organising all the work we have to do in our house, building work, garden etc. This is especially true as our kids are older, and we’d like to assign tasks to them.

Why not make a subscription level for families?
